fields.helpText: SOURCE OF NOTIFICATION identifies the entry from the SOURCE OF  NOTIFICATIONS (#47.76) file that has valid corresponding SUPPORTING  DOCUMENTATION TYPES (#47.75) entry(ies).
ACTIVE? will indicate whether the business rules for this SOURCE OF  NOTIFICATION are active and available for use.
The DATE LAST UPDATED is a date attribute for when the business rule for  the corresponding SOURCE OF NOTIFICATION was last changed.
For each SOURCE OF NOTIFICATION, the DOCUMENT TYPES multiple specifies the allowable DOCUMENT TYPE(s) that will be considered as a valid combination  business rule.
